speaker: speaker1
text: How can we develop a new brand image with no direction whatsoever ?

speaker: speaker2
text: With the fifty forwards he sent out today , maybe we'll inadvertently get inspired .

speaker: speaker1
text: I guess this is a good excuse to surf the Net on someone else's dime .

speaker: speaker2
text: Who'd have thought Bean would be this kind of e-mail fanatic ?

speaker: speaker1
text: He must have just got online for the first time last week . He still thinks it's some kind of new toy .
